allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b['asset_code'],b.get\('balance','N/A'\)\) for b in d.get\('balances',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('flags:', d.get\('flags',{}\)\); [print\(b\) for b in d.get\('balances',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK —', d['marketplace'], '|', len\(d['services']\), 'servicios'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK -', d['marketplace'], '-', len\(d['services']\), 'servicios'\)" echo "" kill %1)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('marketplace:', j.marketplace, '| servicios:', j.services.length\)" echo "" echo "=== /reputation/translate ===" curl -s http://localhost:3000/reputation/translate echo "" kill %1)
